'''chayuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabernariae|tabernariae]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabernariae|tabernariae]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chayuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæyiyith|chæyiyith]] || [[word:chæyiyij|chæyiyij]] || [[word:chæyiyish|chæyiyish]] || [[word:chæyiyi|chæyiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chayuyuyuth|chayuyuyuth]] || [[word:chayuyuyuj|chayuyuyuj]] || [[word:chayuyuyush|chayuyuyush]] || [[word:chayuyuyu|chayuyuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chayuyuth|chayuyuth]] || [[word:chayuyuj|chayuyuj]] || [[word:chayuyush|chayuyush]] || [[word:chayuyu|chayuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chayufyuth|chayufyuth]] || [[word:chayufyuj|chayufyuj]] || [[word:chayufyush|chayufyush]] || [[word:chayufyuf|chayufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chayuyuthu|chayuyuthu]] || [[word:chayuyuju|chayuyuju]] || [[word:chayuyushu|chayuyushu]] || [[word:chayuyuku|chayuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chayuyuth|chayuyuth]] || [[word:chayuyuj|chayuyuj]] || [[word:chayuyush|chayuyush]] || [[word:chayuyu|chayuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chayuyuthul|chayuyuthul]] || [[word:chayuyujul|chayuyujul]] || [[word:chayuyushul|chayuyushul]] || [[word:chayuyukul|chayuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chayuyuthuthu|chayuyuthuthu]] || [[word:chayuyujuju|chayuyujuju]] || [[word:chayuyushushu|chayuyushushu]] || [[word:chayuyuku|chayuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chayuyuthun|chayuyuthun]] || [[word:chayuyujun|chayuyujun]] || [[word:chayuyushun|chayuyushun]] || [[word:chayuyukun|chayuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chayuyuthuoro|chayuyuthuoro]] || [[word:chayuyujuoro|chayuyujuoro]] || [[word:chayuyushuoro|chayuyushuoro]] || [[word:chayuyukuoro|chayuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
